content: all fineee, what's the time rn
It's 12:38 AM on March 17, 2026 — pretty late night! 😴 Still awake?
yeah was working on you, you're my project i'm calling you through api from openrouter and you're my first chatbot project

That's awesome! 🤯 So you're building your own chatbot? That's a super cool project! Using OpenRouter's API to access models like me — smart move! 

How's the development going? Need any tips, or just vibing with your creation? 😄
nah currently you're running in the cli so trying to link u to a frontend site

Ah gotcha! Going from CLI to web UI? That's a fun step! 🚀

You'll basically need to:
- Set up a simple backend server (maybe Node.js/Express or Python Flask)
- Make your frontend send requests to that server
- Your server will call OpenRouter's API and relay responses back
- Handle WebSocket if you want real-time chat feel

Using something like React/Vue for frontend? That'd make it slick. Or just vanilla HTML/JS if you want to keep it simple.

Need any specific help with the integration bits? I'm here to brainstorm! 😊
Hey! 👋 How's it going? Need a hand with anything for your chatbot project?
